name: Gong
description: Sync Gong calls, transcripts, and users into the Shielva knowledge base for revenue intelligence analysis.

install_fields.label: Access Key
install_fields.help: From Gong Settings → API → Access Keys → Access Key

install_fields.label: Access Key Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Your Gong API Access Key Secret
install_fields.help: From Gong Settings → API → Access Keys → Access Key Secret

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate access_key and access_key_secret are present.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Probe GET /v2/users and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Gong calls and users into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Calls
methods.description: Paginated list of calls with optional date filter.

methods.name: Get Call
methods.description: Retrieve extended data for a single call by ID.

methods.name: Get Call Transcript
methods.description: Fetch the transcript for a specific call.

methods.name: List Scorecards
methods.description: Retrieve call coaching scorecards from Gong settings.

apis.name: Install / Authenticate
apis.description: Validate that access_key and access_key_secret are present.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Probe GET /v2/users (limit 1 cursor page) to verify connectivity.

apis.name: Sync Records
apis.description: Fetch calls and users; normalize each into a ConnectorDocument.

apis.name: List Calls
apis.description: Return all calls, optionally filtered by date range.

apis.name: Get Call
apis.description: Return extended data for a single call.

apis.name: Get Call Transcript
apis.description: Return the transcript for a single call.

apis.name: List Scorecards
apis.description: Return all scorecards from Gong settings.
